arts.ttl: 'A complete performance' - how Arsenal overwhelmed Man City
arts.sum: MOTD2 pundits Theo Walcott and Danny Murphy analyse Arsenal's "complete performance" in their 5-1 Premier League win over Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer update: Mikel Arteta gives hint at deadline day plans for January window
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta speaks about his plans on deadline day, with fans keen for the club to bring in offensive reinforcement.

arts.ttl: Arsenal produce 'statement result' of a title winner
arts.sum: Arsenal's 5-1 win over Manchester City on Sunday was a "statement result" according to Jamie Carragher, who believes the performance was just what they needed to reignite their title hopes. Fellow Sky Sports pundits Gary Neville and Thierry Henry hailed the manner in which Arsenal went about beating the Premier League's dominant side of the past four seasons.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'Pushing' to Complete Deal for £50m Attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal are pushing to complete a late deal for Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: 'Tenacity, endeavour, composure' - how Arsenal earned statement win
arts.sum: MOTD2 pundit Danny Murphy explains why Arsenal's statement win over Manchester City was a wonderfully complete performance.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice comments on Arsenal mocking Erling Haaland as Mikel Arteta hails 'brave' duo
arts.sum: Arsenal smashed Manchester City at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday, Mikel Arteta's men romping to a 5-1 thrashing of Pep Guardiola's struggling champions who look a shadow of their former selves

arts.ttl: Gary Neville rips into 'disrespectful' Gabriel after Arsenal star laughed in Erling Haaland's face - and claims he felt 'uneasy' watching the celebration
arts.sum: Gary Neville labelled Arsenal defender Gabriel as 'disrespectful' after he was spotted laughing in the face of Manchester City striker Erling Haaland in Sunday's 5-1 win.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville questions why 'frustrating' Arsenal had to concede an equaliser against Man City before they upped their game and 'set the standard' for title race in 5-1 win
arts.sum: Gary Neville was impressed with Arsenal's rampant second half display against Manchester City but admitted he felt a sense of frustration with the fact it took an equaliser for them to start playing with real intent.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher compares Arsenal's Myles Lewis-Skelly to three England stars after scoring his first Arsenal goal in 5-1 victory over Man City
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher heaped praise on Myles Lewis-Skelly after the 18-year-old scored his first Arsenal goal in their 5-1 in over Man City at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd in bombshell battle as Chelsea eye €90m deal: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea are interested in a wonderkid valued at €90 million and Aston Villa wrapped up a deal to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford. However, within two hours, the deal had collapsed as Bayern rejected two bids, prompting the two clubs to stop the negotiations and seemingly leaving Arsenal in pole position to sign him.
